response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The audio phonetics matched the lyrics of the song 'Meisei Galactica' very well. The lyric sheet in the reference was highly accurate but lacked English translation, which was fully translated manually.
2. JSON Usage: Fully used for identifying key lyrics and puns (e.g. Sora's eyes / Sora no Ai).
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed carefully to track rapid-fire singing and talk segments, preventing delay buildup by aggressively truncating end-times. Included prominent visual title cards.

subtitles.original: ええ、みんなの呟きを待ってるので、たくさん呟いてほしいな。
subtitles.english: Yeah, I'm waiting for everyone's tweets, so please tweet a lot.

subtitles.original: トレンドに入るかな？
subtitles.english: Will we get into the trending topics?

subtitles.original: ねー？
subtitles.english: Right?

subtitles.original: そして、今回のテーマは、8周年を象徴する、無限をモチーフに
subtitles.english: And, this time's theme is based on infinity, which symbolizes our 8th anniversary.

subtitles.original: 宇宙や星をステージに散りばめて、中毒性のあるビート、
subtitles.english: We've scattered space and stars across the stage with an addictive beat...

subtitles.original: リズムの曲で絡めた、えー、デジタルパルスライブです！
subtitles.english: combined with rhythmic songs... yes, it's a Digital Pulse Live!

subtitles.original: デジタルパルスライブです！
subtitles.english: It's a Digital Pulse Live!

subtitles.original: こちらね、大きな天球が曲によってどう変わるのかを見ていてください。
subtitles.english: Please look at how this large celestial sphere changes depending on the song.

subtitles.original: そしてね、今年ののんのんは、えー、いつつなので、
subtitles.english: And also, this year's Non-Non... there are five of them,

subtitles.original: くるくる回転してます。くるくるくるくるくるくる...
subtitles.english: so they are spinning round and round. Round and round and round...

subtitles.original: そして、夜空にはソラザウルスもいるよ。
subtitles.english: And, there's also a Sorasaurus in the night sky.

subtitles.original: ソラザウルスはね、なんとね、炎を出せるようになりました。
subtitles.english: The Sorasaurus can now breathe fire!

subtitles.original: ぽぅっ！
subtitles.english: Whoosh!

subtitles.original: ちゃんと、アンキモ座もあるんですけど、見えるかな？
subtitles.english: There's also the Ankimo Constellation, can you see it?

subtitles.original: もちろん、あと今年も新衣装のお披露目や、告知したゲストと、
subtitles.english: Of course, there's also the reveal of new outfits, and our announced guests...

subtitles.original: あとは、どんな曲を披露するのかを楽しみにしててくだいさいね！
subtitles.english: and look forward to what kind of songs we'll perform!

subtitles.original: そして、次に行く前に、ぷちお披露目、最初にしちゃいましょう！
subtitles.english: And before we move on, let's start with a mini-reveal first!

subtitles.original: カメラさん、上を向いてください。
subtitles.english: Camera-san, please look up.

subtitles.original: はい！
subtitles.english: Yes!

subtitles.original: はい、というわけで、新しいクラゲヘア、新髪型お披露目です！
subtitles.english: Yes! So, here is the reveal of my new jellyfish hairstyle!

subtitles.original: それでは早速、ゲストパートに行ってみよう！可愛い、ありがとう！おお、可愛い、ありがとう！
subtitles.english: Now then, let's head straight into the guest segment! 'Cute,' thank you! Oh, 'cute,' thank you!

subtitles.original: シロ組さんもいっぱいコメントしててね！
subtitles.english: Siro-gumi members, please leave lots of comments too!

subtitles.original: 最初のゲストは、この人です！
subtitles.english: The first guest is this person!

subtitles.original: GUEST: 電脳少女シロ
subtitles.english: [Guest: Cyber Girl Siro]

subtitles.original: 星を降らすたびに...
subtitles.english: Every time I make the stars fall...

subtitles.original: 心寄せるたびに...
subtitles.english: Every time we draw our hearts closer...

subtitles.original: 迷い込んだ夜はギャラクティカ！
subtitles.english: The night we wandered in is Galactica!

subtitles.original: 明星ギャラクティカ\n作詞・作曲：ナユタン星人
subtitles.english: [Song: Meisei Galactica\nLyrics/Composition: Nayutan Seijin]

subtitles.original: 今夜はソラノアイをライトが...
subtitles.english: Tonight, the light on Sora's eyes (Sora no Ai)...

subtitles.original: 嫌に眩しいから...
subtitles.english: is awfully blinding.

subtitles.original: 街のネオンを...
subtitles.english: So the neon lights of the town...

subtitles.original: さあ取りよせ...
subtitles.english: now, gather them here.

subtitles.original: 明星ギャラクティカ、2人で。
subtitles.english: Meisei Galactica, the two of us.

subtitles.original: シドけないくらい...
subtitles.english: So seductive...

subtitles.original: ユラユラ 揺らぐ星が 心まどわすから...
subtitles.english: The swaying, trembling stars bewitch my heart.

subtitles.original: この夜だけ... whale
subtitles.english: Only for this night...

subtitles.original: 君だけ...
subtitles.english: only you...

subtitles.original: 夜空に 星を 星を 駆ける...
subtitles.english: race through the stars in the night sky.

subtitles.original: 見つめて あなたの表情...
subtitles.english: Look at me, your expression...

subtitles.original: 照らして 明星ギャラクティカ...
subtitles.english: illuminates the Meisei Galactica.

subtitles.original: 見上げた...
subtitles.english: Looking up...

subtitles.original: 夜空は...
subtitles.english: at the night sky...

subtitles.original: 一等星が...
subtitles.english: the first-magnitude star...

subtitles.original: チラリ チラって光る...
subtitles.english: flickers and shines.

subtitles.original: チカチカ 踊り踊って...
subtitles.english: Twinkle, twinkle, dancing along...

subtitles.original: 孤独を溶かして...
subtitles.english: melting away loneliness.

subtitles.original: 2人の影で...
subtitles.english: With our two shadows,
